business_question: Which product categories generated the highest sales revenue during the last fiscal quarter?
business_context: Merchandising teams want to identify the strongest-performing categories to optimize inventory allocation and future purchasing decisions.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    p.CATEGORY,
    SUM(s.NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_NET_UNITS,
    SUM(s.UNITS_SOLD) AS TOTAL_UNITS
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
    ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
JOIN DIM_DATE d
    ON s.DATE_KEY = d.DATE_KEY
WHERE d.FISCAL_QUARTER = 'Q1'
GROUP BY p.CATEGORY
ORDER BY TOTAL_NET_UNITS DESC;
